elements.description: A stressed man in a blue shirt sits at a messy desk, surrounded by piles of papers and a clock showing 11:59. His hands are in his hair, eyes wide with panic. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
A calendar with crossed-out dates and scribbled notes, lying on the desk next to a spilled coffee cup. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
A close-up of the man’s face, his mouth open as he shouts, with a thought bubble showing a chaotic to-do list. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
A stack of unpaid bills and a red overdue stamp on a letter, placed on the edge of the desk. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
